name: Daily Mobility (10 Min)
description: Quick daily floor routine to do every morning or before any workout. Core activation, hip mobility, spine health. Light enough to do 7 days a week without affecting recovery. Just a mat and 10 minutes.

exercises.notes: Slow, breathe into it. Exhale on cat, inhale on cow.
Opposite arm/leg. Keep lower back pressed into floor.
Extend opposite arm/leg, hold 2 seconds, squeeze glute.
30s each side. Push hips forward gently.
30s each side. Rock gently into it if tight.
Touch toes, grab ankles, drop into deep squat, stand. Repeat.
Squeeze hard at top, 2 second hold
Tight everything. Squeeze glutes, brace core.

tips: Do this every day — it won't affect recovery from the main program
On gym days, this doubles as your pre-workout warmup
On rest days, this keeps you moving without taxing anything
If you're tight somewhere, spend an extra 30s on that stretch
Don't do heavy core (ab wheel, weighted crunches) before a squat or deadlift day — this is light enough to be fine
